text_block_list.text: Summer camp is over, and so, Seiun Sky is...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm done for... Gimme a second to rest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And by "a second," I mean "until the Kikuka Sho."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, King. Why are you looking so serious?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It seems you were pushing yourself quite hard at
summer camp... I assume you're plotting
something?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Plotting? Don't be mean. Everyone pushes
themselves at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, well... I was training with Special Week.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: She improved a great deal at camp. She's far stronger now than she was at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's Spe for ya. The harder she works, the
better she gets.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Doesn't anything worry you? Why are you so—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, how exactly are you planning on overcoming such hurdles?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa—even if I did have some ideas, what
makes you think I'd share 'em with you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're racing in the Kikuka Sho too, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. Correct.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess I can tell you one thing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wouldn't it be fun if the number one favorite—the one everyone expects to win... got whooped?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh... I wasn't expecting that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh, that's big talk. I do hope you're ready to
back it up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll leave you with this. I have also risen to new heights.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And I will not be losing to Special Week or you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: King's just as high and mighty as always, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, the higher up she is, the more fun it'll be to
bring her crashing down. ♪

With that, our exciting summer camp experience
comes to an end.
